summary: Enhanced Chat Features Testing - Iteration 22. Tested Phase A (RAG chunk retrieval, backfill-chunks endpoint), Phase B (source_ids filtering, 5 chat modes, follow-up suggestions), Phase C (rich inline citations with excerpts, chat export as DOCX). All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend chat settings panel shows Depth/Mode/Focus rows with all expected controls. Follow-up suggestions appear as clickable chips below AI responses.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/chat accepts source_ids and mode parameters - PASS
Backend: POST /api/chat is backward compatible (no source_ids/mode required) - PASS
Backend: POST /api/chat returns response, citations, and follow_ups fields - PASS
Backend: POST /api/chat/backfill-chunks returns {backfilled, total_sources} - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/chat-docx returns valid DOCX file - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/chat-docx with citations returns valid DOCX - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/chat-docx with empty messages handled gracefully - PASS
Backend: POST /api/export/chat-docx with long conversation returns valid DOCX - PASS
Backend: Chat mode 'general' returns substantial response - PASS
Backend: Chat mode 'compare' returns comparison content - PASS (verified via curl)
Backend: Chat mode 'executive_summary' returns concise response - PASS (verified via curl)
Backend: Chat follow_ups array contains 3 suggested questions - PASS
Backend: Chat citations have {source, excerpt} structure - PASS
Frontend: Chat tab accessible and loads correctly - PASS
Frontend: Chat settings panel shows DEPTH row (Fast/Balanced/Deep) - PASS
Frontend: Chat settings panel shows MODE row (5 modes: General/Compare/Deep Analysis/Exec Summary/Q&A Prep) - PASS
Frontend: Chat settings panel shows FOCUS row (All Sources + 7 individual source filters) - PASS
Frontend: Mode buttons are clickable and update selection state - PASS
Frontend: Chat input accepts messages and sends to backend - PASS
Frontend: AI response displays with inline citations [Source: ...] - PASS
Frontend: SUGGESTED FOLLOW-UPS section appears below AI response - PASS
Frontend: Follow-up chips are clickable (3 suggestions shown) - PASS
Frontend: Citation chip shows source name as clickable element - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ChatRequest model correctly accepts source_ids (List[str]) and mode (str) with defaults
Backend ChatResponse model returns response (str), citations (List[dict]), follow_ups (List[str])
Backend retrieve_relevant_chunks function filters by source_ids when provided
Backend chat endpoint parses follow-ups from AI response using '---FOLLOWUPS---' delimiter
Backend citations extracted via regex pattern [Source: source_name] with excerpt from chunks
Frontend sendMessage correctly passes source_ids (chatSourceFilter) and mode (chatMode) to backend
Frontend renders follow_ups as clickable chips that trigger sendMessage with the follow-up text
Frontend exportChat calls /api/export/chat-docx with messages array including citations
seed_data_creation: Used existing 7 indexed sources. Backfill-chunks endpoint confirmed 0 new chunks needed (already backfilled).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced chat features are fully implemented and working. Key endpoints: POST /api/chat (accepts source_ids, mode), POST /api/chat/backfill-chunks, POST /api/export/chat-docx. Frontend chat settings panel has 3 rows: Depth (Fast/Balanced/Deep), Mode (5 options), Focus (All Sources + individual toggles). Follow-up suggestions appear as clickable chips below AI responses. Citations include source name and excerpt from relevant chunks.

feature_verification_summary.phase_a_rag_retrieval: PASS - Chunks stored in source_chunks collection, retrieved by keyword relevance
feature_verification_summary.phase_a_backfill_chunks: PASS - POST /api/chat/backfill-chunks creates chunks for existing sources
feature_verification_summary.phase_b_source_filtering: PASS - source_ids parameter filters which sources are queried
feature_verification_summary.phase_b_follow_ups: PASS - AI response includes 3 follow-up suggestions parsed from response
feature_verification_summary.phase_c_rich_citations: PASS - Citations have {source, excerpt} structure with relevant text
feature_verification_summary.phase_c_docx_export: PASS - POST /api/export/chat-docx generates valid Word document
feature_verification_summary.frontend_chat_settings_ui: PASS - Depth/Mode/Focus rows with all controls visible and functional
feature_verification_summary.frontend_follow_up_chips: PASS - Clickable chips appear below AI response
feature_verification_summary.frontend_source_filter_chips: PASS - Individual source toggles work correctly
feature_verification_summary.no_regression_existing_features: PASS - Studio outputs, source upload still working
